claim: NovaBridge Financial Group completed its acquisition of Sterling Community Bank for $340M, adding $2.1B in assets and 38 branch locations.

corpus.title: News: NovaBridge Financial Group — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: NovaBridge Financial Group completed its acquisition of Sterling Community Bank for $340M, adding $2...
corpus.content:
Breaking: NovaBridge Financial Group makes a significant move amid changes in the corporate sector

NovaBridge Financial Group completed its acquisition of Sterling Community Bank for $340M, adding $2.1B in assets and 38 branch locations. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in corporate strategy. A spokesperson for NovaBridge Financial Group declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.snippet: NovaTech Systems reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. R...
corpus.content: NovaTech Systems reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $417M was up 11.5% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

corpus.title: NovaBridge Financial Group — SEC Form 8-K (Acquisition Completion)
corpus.source: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission EDGAR
corpus.snippet: NovaBridge Financial Group completed its acquisition of Sterling Community Bank for $340M, adding $2.1B in assets and 38...
corpus.content:
NOVABRIDGE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC. — CURRENT REPORT (FORM 8-K)
Date of Report: February 29, 2024

ITEM 2.01 — COMPLETION OF ACQUISITION OR DISPOSITION OF ASSETS

On February 29, 2024, NovaBridge Financial Group, Inc. completed its previously announced acquisition of Sterling Community Bank (OTCQB: STCB) pursuant to the Merger Agreement dated October 4, 2023.

Consideration: $340,000,000 in cash ($18.72 per Sterling share at closing).
Assets acquired: approximately $2.1 billion (as of December 31, 2023)
Loan portfolio acquired: $1.4 billion
Deposits assumed: $1.75 billion
Branch locations: 38 (across 4 states: OH, KY, IN, WV)

The acquisition expands NovaBridge's total asset base to approximately $9.8B and increases its branch count to 124. Core deposit premium paid: 6.2%. Regulatory approvals received from Federal Reserve and OCC on February 12, 2024.

corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — NovaBridge Financial Group
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of NovaBridge Financial Group data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — NovaBridge Financial Group
Date: 2024-02-29

This record confirms NovaBridge Financial Group completed its acquisition of Sterling Community Bank for $340M, adding $2.1B in assets and 38 branch locations. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.
